title: Iterators, Generators, and Lazy Pipelines
description: Stream large activity exports through bounded-memory validation and aggregation stages. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a lazy activity-processing pipeline while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Implement and consume iterator protocol behavior without accidental exhaustion.
Use generators and itertools for readable bounded-memory transformations.
Make pipeline errors and resource lifetime observable.
